design_philosophy: Clean, authoritative enterprise dashboard prioritizing data clarity. Neutral surfaces (white/slate) punctuated by emerald green strictly for key actions, positive trends, and active states. Generous white space, progressive disclosure, and modular bento-style widgets.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Optical alignment, bento-grid modularity for dashboard widgets. Density where needed (tables), generous spacing around containers.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-6. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for main charts.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Containers with borders must use p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-lg or rounded-md). No pill-shaped buttons unless explicitly required.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-sm, border darkens.
surface_strategies.tables: Professional dense tables. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Sticky headers.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background with hard bottom border. Sticky top z-50.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Collapsible side navigation to maximize horizontal space for data tables.

components.buttons: Primary buttons in Emerald Green. Secondary buttons use outline variant (border-border text-text_main).
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with 1px border. Focus state must have ring-2 ring-emerald-500/20 border-emerald-500.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Solid flat surfaces, backdrop blur on the overlay.
components.toast: Sonner for toast notifications, bottom-right placement.

motion.transitions: Hover states: transition-colors duration-200. Interactions: scale-95 on active.
motion.animations: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and table rows.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on emerald buttons meets 4.5:1 (use darker emerald #059669 for light mode buttons if needed for contrast).
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Modern warehouse boxes, use as a subtle half-screen image for the login/register layout.
Abstract emerald crystalline pattern. Use as a low-opacity texture overlay on the auth sidebar or header.
Professional portrait for the dashboard header profile dropdown.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts sonner
Apply Manrope for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body in index.css.
Configure Tailwind with the provided Emerald/Slate color scale in tailwind.config.js.
Build the dashboard using a layout with a collapsible sidebar and sticky top header.
Implement Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dialogs, Select, Dropdown Menu, Forms, Tabs, and Skeletons for loading states.
For the Products CRUD, use a dense data table with search, filters, and pagination. Implement mock functionality for Excel/PDF export.
Use Recharts for the Stock Movement Trend, Category Distribution, Monthly Growth, and Supplier Contribution charts on the dashboard.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) and important text elements have a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Avoid overuse of heavy card shadows; stick to flat 1px border designs for widgets to match the Swiss & High-Contrast aesthetic.
Use the provided warehouse image for the right side of the split login screen.
